# Site

## MCP Access
- MCP endpoint: //mcp
- Protocol: Model Context Protocol (SSE transport)
- Auth: none required
- Docs: //mcp/info

## Collections
- posts: Blog Posts (27 published documents)
- pages: Pages (4 published documents)
